patch:
@@ -0,0 +1,7 @@
+CREATE TABLE `workspace` (
+	`id` text PRIMARY KEY,
+	`branch` text,
+	`project_id` text NOT NULL,
+	`config` text NOT NULL,
+	CONSTRAINT `fk_workspace_project_id_project_id_fk` FOREIGN KEY (`project_id`) REFERENCES `project`(`id`) ON DELETE CASCADE
+);
